description.zh-CN: 提供了丰富的开源数据集，涵盖多种领域和语言，支持自然语言处理、计算机视觉等多种任务。
description.en: Offers a rich collection of open-source datasets covering multiple domains and languages, supporting NLP, computer vision, and more.

description.zh-CN: 致力于收集和整理高质量的开源数据集，方便研究人员和开发者使用。
description.en: Dedicated to collecting and organizing high-quality open-source datasets for researchers and developers.

description.zh-CN: 谷歌提供的数据集搜索工具，可帮助用户找到来自不同来源的公开数据集。
description.en: Google's dataset search tool helping users find public datasets from various sources.

description.zh-CN: Kaggle平台上的开源数据集，涉及各种领域和任务，常用于数据竞赛和实践。
description.en: Open datasets on the Kaggle platform, covering various domains and tasks, commonly used for data competitions and practice.

description.zh-CN: 提供了多种开源数据集，支持模型的训练和评估，涵盖多个领域。
description.en: Provides various open-source datasets supporting model training and evaluation across multiple domains.

description.zh-CN: 专注于中文领域的开源数据集，包括自然语言处理、语音识别等方向。
description.en: Focused on Chinese-language open datasets, including NLP, speech recognition, and more.

description.zh-CN: 在GitHub上整理的优秀的公开数据集资源，涉及多个领域和方向。
description.en: A curated list of awesome public datasets on GitHub, covering multiple domains and topics.

description.zh-CN: 提供了大量的公开数据集，涵盖多个领域，可在亚马逊云服务上直接访问和使用。
description.en: Provides numerous public datasets across multiple domains, directly accessible on AWS cloud services.

description.zh-CN: 阿里云天池平台提供的开源数据集，涵盖多个领域的竞赛数据和公开数据。
description.en: Open datasets from Alibaba Cloud's Tianchi platform, covering competition and public data across multiple domains.

description.zh-CN: 加州大学欧文分校提供的开源数据集，涵盖多个领域，常用于机器学习研究。
description.en: Open datasets from UC Irvine, covering multiple domains, widely used for machine learning research.

name.zh-CN: 计算机视觉开源数据集

description.zh-CN: 专注于计算机视觉领域的开源数据集，支持相关模型的训练和评估。
description.en: Open datasets focused on computer vision, supporting related model training and evaluation.

description.zh-CN: 北京智源人工智能研究院提供的开源数据集，涵盖多个领域，支持大模型的训练。
description.en: Open datasets from Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence, supporting large model training across multiple domains.

description.zh-CN: 百度飞桨平台提供的开源数据集，支持深度学习模型的训练和评估。
description.en: Open datasets from Baidu's PaddlePaddle platform, supporting deep learning model training and evaluation.

description.zh-CN: 开源平台提供的多种开源数据集，涵盖多个领域，支持模型的训练和研究。
description.en: Various open datasets from the OpenI platform, covering multiple domains, supporting model training and research.

description.zh-CN: 包含25亿张图像和相应的文本描述，适用于多模态模型的训练。
description.en: Contains 2.5 billion images with corresponding text descriptions, suitable for multimodal model training.

description.zh-CN: 提供了大量的网页爬取数据，可用于语言模型的训练。
description.en: Provides large-scale web crawl data for language model training.

description.zh-CN: 由多个数据集组成的大型语言模型训练数据集，涵盖多种文本类型。
description.en: A large language model training dataset composed of multiple datasets, covering various text types.

description.zh-CN: 用于物理模拟的机器人交互数据集，适用于强化学习和机器人控制任务。
description.en: Robot interaction dataset for physics simulation, suitable for reinforcement learning and robot control tasks.

description.zh-CN: 提供了多种机器人交互数据集，支持机器人学习和控制任务。
description.en: Provides various robot interaction datasets, supporting robot learning and control tasks.

description.zh-CN: 经典的Atari游戏数据集，用于强化学习算法的基准测试。
description.en: Classic Atari game dataset for benchmarking reinforcement learning algorithms.

description.zh-CN: 从网络平台上爬取的用户行为数据，适用于训练交互式代理。
description.en: User behavior data crawled from web platforms, suitable for training interactive agents.

description.zh-CN: 用于评估AI常识推理和解决问题能力的多选题数据集。
description.en: Multiple-choice dataset for evaluating AI common sense reasoning and problem-solving abilities.

description.zh-CN: 包含数千个语音命令的音频数据集，适用于语音识别任务。
description.en: Audio dataset containing thousands of voice commands, suitable for speech recognition tasks.

description.zh-CN: 包含环境声音事件的音频数据集，适用于音频场景分类任务。
description.en: Audio dataset containing environmental sound events, suitable for audio scene classification tasks.

description.zh-CN: 包含45,000篇关于COVID-19的学术文章，适用于医疗AI研究。
description.en: Contains 45,000 scholarly articles about COVID-19, suitable for medical AI research.

description.zh-CN: 由Waymo发布的最多样化的自动驾驶数据集。
description.en: The most diverse autonomous driving dataset released by Waymo.

description.zh-CN: 包含大量标注图像的数据集，适用于计算机视觉任务。
description.en: Dataset containing a large number of annotated images, suitable for computer vision tasks.

description.zh-CN: 包含20,500多张不同狗品种的图像数据集。
description.en: Image dataset containing over 20,500 images of different dog breeds.

description.zh-CN: 包含超过40,000个口语描述的音频数据集。
description.en: Audio dataset containing over 40,000 spoken descriptions.

description.zh-CN: 美国政府开放数据平台，涵盖农业、气候、教育、能源等领域的公开数据集。
description.en: U.S. government open data platform covering public datasets in agriculture, climate, education, energy, and more.

description.zh-CN: 欧盟统计局提供的经济、人口、社会等多领域统计数据。
description.en: Statistical data from the EU statistics office covering economics, population, society, and more.

description.zh-CN: 大型图像数据集，包含数百万张标注图像，广泛用于计算机视觉任务。
description.en: Large-scale image dataset containing millions of annotated images, widely used for computer vision tasks.

description.zh-CN: 通用物体识别与分割数据集，适用于目标检测和图像分割任务。
description.en: Common Objects in Context dataset for object detection and image segmentation tasks.

description.zh-CN: 世界银行提供的全球经济指标、发展数据及统计报告。
description.en: Global economic indicators, development data, and statistical reports from the World Bank.

description.zh-CN: NASA地球科学数据，涵盖气候、地质、环境等领域的遥感数据。
description.en: NASA Earth science data covering climate, geology, and environmental remote sensing data.

description.zh-CN: 包含商家信息、用户评论和图片数据，适用于商业分析和NLP任务。
description.en: Contains business information, user reviews, and image data, suitable for business analytics and NLP tasks.

description.zh-CN: 经典的小规模图像分类数据集，包含10或100个类别的标注图像。
description.en: Classic small-scale image classification dataset containing annotated images in 10 or 100 categories.

description.zh-CN: 世界卫生组织提供的全球公共卫生统计数据，包括疾病、营养等主题。
description.en: Global public health statistics from WHO, covering topics such as diseases, nutrition, and more.

description.zh-CN: 包含数百万篇arXiv学术论文的元数据和全文，适用于文本挖掘研究。
description.en: Contains metadata and full text of millions of arXiv scholarly papers, suitable for text mining research.

description.zh-CN: 包含1000小时英语语音数据，适用于语音识别模型训练。
description.en: Contains 1,000 hours of English speech data, suitable for speech recognition model training.

description.zh-CN: 自动驾驶领域经典数据集，包含立体视觉、激光雷达等多模态数据。
description.en: Classic autonomous driving dataset containing stereo vision, LiDAR, and other multimodal data.

description.zh-CN: 城市街景语义分割数据集，支持自动驾驶和计算机视觉研究。
description.en: Urban street scene semantic segmentation dataset, supporting autonomous driving and computer vision research.

description.zh-CN: 美国疾病控制与预防中心发布的公共卫生数据集，涵盖疾病追踪和健康统计。
description.en: Public health datasets from the U.S. CDC, covering disease tracking and health statistics.

description.zh-CN: 开源地理数据协作项目，提供全球范围的道路、建筑等地理信息数据。
description.en: Open-source geographic data collaboration project providing worldwide road, building, and other geographic information.

description.zh-CN: 涵盖政治、体育、文化等领域的数据集，常用于数据新闻分析。
description.en: Datasets covering politics, sports, culture, and more, commonly used for data journalism analysis.

description.zh-CN: 包含人体蛋白质分布的组织图像数据，支持生物医学研究。
description.en: Contains tissue image data on human protein distribution, supporting biomedical research.
